input.topic: CyberAv3ngers IRGC-Affiliated ICS and Water Sector Targeting Campaign
input.notes: Iranian IRGC-affiliated threat group CyberAv3ngers / IRGC Cyber-Electronic Command conducting targeted attacks against industrial control systems and water and wastewater utilities using default credentials on Unitronics PLCs. Active 2023-2024, with victims spanning the US, Israel, Ireland, and other nations. Multi-sector ICS targeting campaign with clear government attribution from FBI, CISA, NSA, and EPA joint advisory AA23-335A. Bounded scope: distinct from broader Iranian state-sponsored incident articles and from Predatory Sparrow industrial attacks. Conservative attribution: IRGC-affiliated confirmed by US government; no internal IRGC sub-unit attribution required.

history.note: Manual link submission from PR #549; renumbered from stale TASK-2026-0236 to avoid merged task collision
